nodes.name: RSS Feed Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when a new blog post is detected

nodes.name: Filter New Posts
nodes.notes: Only process posts published after last check

nodes.name: Fetch Full Article
nodes.notes: Fetch complete article text from URL

nodes.name: Generate LinkedIn Copy
nodes.notes: Generate LinkedIn post: professional tone, bullet structure, max 1200 chars

nodes.name: Generate Twitter Copy
nodes.notes: Generate Twitter/X post: data hook, max 270 chars

nodes.name: Wait for Approval
nodes.notes: Waits for Telegram reply: APPROVE / EDIT / SKIP

nodes.name: Log to Airtable
nodes.notes: Log all published posts for engagement tracking

_meta.description: Blog RSS -> Claude API -> Telegram approval -> LinkedIn + Twitter
_meta.author: kapil433
_meta.setup_instructions: 1. Set RSS Feed URL to your blog. 2. Add Anthropic API key in n8n credentials. 3. Add Telegram Bot token and your chat ID. 4. Add LinkedIn + Twitter API credentials. 5. Set Airtable base and table.
